Okay so like Murphy just got shanked
Of course she should have
It's a debuff that cannot be cleansed at all
Even healers can't heal that much over times

Helot exalt is 50 AoE without wheels
You add pickman for 22 dmg AoE and counting his cards of para + poison it's more
You add winkle vulnerable and it's another 25% dmg receuved increased

Imagine surviving a one shot barely
Only to eat 50 sacrifice stacks, 22 poisons
22 poison can be cleansed but not 50 sacrifice
Then it's 25 dmg next turn
Etc
You can't heal that much with healers atm
Otherwise everyone would use tht broken healer

Just the branch

Gmurphy has now nothing noteworthy in her kit, besides zero cost aliem grneration
25% more dmg for one turn, but opponent still got their turn before taking this fmg

Nautila already does same 25%  dmg buff, that works immediately and also counter weakness, and also put some barriers and all that is in the same purple slot
I'll be happy to be proven wrong, but for now me personally think GMurphy kinda does nothing and has no notable synergies
